sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3628" key="a)krorri/nion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-ρρίνιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥίς</etym>) <sense id="n3628.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tip of the nose</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:80" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.80</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
